subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the Blessed Tree! Seek thou neither shelter nor refuge in this fleeting world, and in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الکریم من الشجره المبارکه در این جهان فانی ملجا و مامنی مجو و در
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
